5 new LLM scenarios: ValidateFromWorktree, ApproveSpecFromWorktree,

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

)"","description":"Commit updated plan","git_commit_id":"59604f7"}

{"bash_command":"git","full_command":"git add .mindspec/docs/specs/057-worktree-aware-resolution/spec.md .mindspec/docs/specs/057-worktree-aware-resolution/plan.md && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
plan: review fixes for 057-worktree-aware-resolution

- Add state/validate.go to spec impacted domains
- Move EffectiveSpecRoot removal from Bead 1 to Bead 2 (build-order fix)
- Split Bead 4: deterministic integration tests for CLI behavior,
  LLM tests only for agent navigation (ApproveSpec/PlanFromWorktree)
- Clarify Bead 3 step 1 (refactor existing scan, then add worktree scan)
- Add focus fallback provenance entry (spec requirement 6)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"","description":"Commit review fixes","git_commit_id":"1fb6b71"}
